'''Mount Usca''' was a [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] situated on the cape on [[Garos IV]], where the [[Locura Ocean|Locura]] and [[Cabalia Sea|Cabalia]] [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] met.

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|5|Turning Point (Charlene Newcomb)}} {{Mo}}
